title: Parliament passes survivor compensation super access laws
full_text:

summary: The Australian Parliament has approved new laws allowing survivors of abuse to access their superannuation funds for compensation. This change aims to provide financial support to those affected by past injustices.
heading: Superannuation and Investments
key_points: Survivors of abuse can access superannuation
Helps those affected by past injustices
ticker_line: Parliament approves super access for abuse survivors
